user.description: Enter your Samsung Frame TV IP address. If this is the first connection you should see a popup on your TV asking for authorization.

data_description.host: The IP or hostname of your TV.
data_description.name: The display name for the device in Home Assistant.

pairing.description: Accept the authorization popup on {device}. After accepting, click Submit to finish pairing.

reauth_confirm.title: Re-authorize {device}
reauth_confirm.description: The stored authorization for {device} is no longer valid. Make sure the TV is on, accept the authorization popup on the TV, then click Submit to re-pair.

encrypted_pairing.description: Please enter the PIN displayed on {device}.

data_description.pin: The PIN displayed on your TV.

error.auth_missing: Authorization is required. Accept the popup on your TV, then submit again.
error.cannot_connect: Cannot connect to the TV. Verify the IP, network, and that the TV is awake.
error.invalid_pin: PIN is invalid, please try again.
error.not_supported: This Samsung device is currently not supported.

abort.already_in_progress: A configuration flow is already in progress.

init.title: Configure Art Director Options
init.description: Matte style/color, the slideshow toggle and the favorites filter are controlled by their own entities; this dialog covers the remaining settings.

data.use_power_key_on_off: Use Power Key as OFF fallback
data.cleanup_dry_run: Cleanup: Dry run (log only, don't delete)

data_description.ai_provider: Which AI vision service tags images dropped into the inbox.
data_description.gemini_api_key: Required when the provider is Gemini. Get a free key at aistudio.google.com.
data_description.openai_api_key: Required when the provider is OpenAI. The 'openai' Python package must be installed.
data_description.slideshow_interval: How often to rotate art, in minutes. 0 disables the timer.
data_description.slideshow_source_type: Where rotation picks images from: a folder, a tag filter, or the whole library.
data_description.slideshow_filter: Folder path (Folder source) or comma-separated tags (Tags source). Prefix a tag with '-' to exclude it.
data_description.use_power_key_on_off: If turning Art Mode off fails, send the TV's power key as a fallback.
data_description.cleanup_max_items: Maximum artworks to keep on the TV; oldest are deleted first.
data_description.cleanup_max_age_days: Delete artworks older than this many days. 0 disables the age limit.
data_description.cleanup_only_integration_managed: Only ever delete artworks this integration uploaded (never your own/Art Store items).
data_description.cleanup_dry_run: Preview cleanup in the logs without deleting anything.
data_description.diagnostics_verbose: Enable detailed debug logging for troubleshooting.
